ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of node (e.g., vertex attribute, color, coordinate) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the node (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_node_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_type_id") REFERENCES node_types ("node_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_types" (
  "node_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node type */,
  "node_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the node type (e.g., vertex attribute, color, coordinate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the node type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the node type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the node type (e.g., basic, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vertex_attributes" (
  "vertex_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vertex attribute */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node that the vertex attribute belongs to */,
  "attrib" TEXT /* Vertex attribute information (e.g., X3DVertexAttributeNode) */,
  "ccw" INTEGER /* Clockwise (ccw) value for the vertex attribute */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color information for the vertex attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the vertex attribute was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the vertex attribute */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the vertex attribute */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the vertex attribute (e.g., JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vertex_attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vertex_attributes_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node that the color belongs to */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color information (e.g., X3DColorNode) */,
  "color_per_vertex" INTEGER /* Color per vertex value (true or false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the color */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the color */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the color (e.g., JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colors_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coordinates" (
  "coordinate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coordinate */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node that the coordinate belongs to */,
  "coord" TEXT /* Coordinate information (e.g., X3DCoordinateNode) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the coordinate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the coordinate */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the coordinate */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the coordinate (e.g., JSON format) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coordinate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coordinates_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the node */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the node was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the access log entry was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the node */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
